name_en: OHANEL 🚩🚩🚩 25B Black Gold 25 Bag. The 25 bag is incredibly hot, so they followed up with a backpack series! Retaining the 25 bag shape, they added a backpack style! The sides still have double pockets √ The opening has a drawstring adjustment; smooth lines and a structured shape continue the 25 series' practicality. 🤩🤩 Large capacity; the opening has a magnetic snap! Security is maxed out!! I was heart-pounded seeing the real thing 💓. 5600. Size: 23x23x14cm
